results.title: Planet Carrier: Anatomy, Load Paths, and Design Trade-Offs
results.snippet: The planet carrier is the structural backbone of every planetary gear system — not a passive cage, but an active load-distributing precision component. One-piece vs two-piece is a bearing-configuration trade-off, not a quality hierarchy.

results.snippet: The Planetary Gear block models a gear train with sun, planet, and ring gears. results.snippet: The design of planetary gears is reviewed for spur and helical gears. Spur or helical gears each have their advantages in planetary gearing. This notebook reviews the unique geometric attributes of planetary gears and their significance to planetary gear mesh operation.
